acceptedIds: Alabama driver's license or non-driver ID
Alabama Law Enforcement Agency digital ID
exceptions: Voters without acceptable photo ID may cast a provisional ballot and return within 5 days with ID or sign a voter ID affidavit before a notary or two witnesses.
provisionalBallotRules: Return within 5 business days with acceptable ID.
phonesAtPollsDetail: Cell phones may not be used for communication inside polling places.
